name: Plattis
short_description: Be a hero robot guy in this 2d platformer. finish levels and avoid dangerous enemies
detailed_description:
Story:


2d platformer where you play with robot character. Finish levels and end of level there are trophy. Beware several deadlious enemies like Flower,Slime, Bee etc. Also dangerous traps like spikes. Falling out of map will kill also player. There is also moving platforms and jumping platforms. 12 Levels with level unlock system

Features:

- 12 levels
- Steam achievements
- Unlocked level system
- Collect 10 fruits to get extra life
- Moving platforms
- Jumping pads
- Several enemies: Bee, Chicken,Duck, mushroom, Flower, Rad, Rock,Slime, Spike Turtle
- Saving system
